summary: A nostalgic personal favorite despite an “alright” performance, with no specific details on recording quality
review: The reviewer recounts a formative experience attending three shows at age 13 and declares this night the best of those for their group, though they describe the actual performance as merely alright. No technical aspects of the recording or specific musical highlights are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated (3‑star) review with vague comments; neither show nor recording quality is detailed, leading to an average rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer gives no specific feedback on set structure or pacing.
